# 📦 Installation

### Required

- [Spell Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine "")
 

# ⛲️ Features
 
Adds new structures into villages, containing Spell Binding Table, so you may find a faster way to obtain Spell Books.

Gazebos commonly spawn in villages, this can be configured in `config/gazebo/villages.json`.

Gazebo variants:

- Desert

- Plains

- Savanna

- Snowy

- Taiga


![Gazebo variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XIpMGI6r/images/7f2bfa1fa65bc88a886a48c791ad92d9bdf735ef.jpeg "")
